Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "BLOBBER-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Blobber.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Removed disk highscore loading and saving by removing the calls to $F5ED (load) at $47F0 and $F4A5 (save) at $44AD.
